title: Unease deepens in Russia as Ukraine steps up long-range strikes
summary_full: Experts said Vladimir Putin was unlikely to change course despite worsening fuel shortages and a sharp decline in the stock market.
summary_public: Experts said Vladimir Putin was unlikely to change course despite worsening fuel shortages and a sharp decline in the stock market.
